basicDetails.schemeName: Personality Development and Yogasana Training Camp (TASP)

nodalDepartmentName.label: Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme "Personality Development and Yogasana Training Camp (TASP)" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to enhance personality and promote physical, mental, and spiritual well-being through training for tribal youth by organizing seven-day camps.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "TASP Personality Development and Yogasana Training Camp (TASP)" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to empower Scheduled Tribe (ST) youth across 17 districts of the state by providing a structured seven-day training program. This camp focuses on personality development and yogasana training, helping the participants to develop their physical, mental, and spiritual health. The scheme seeks to uplift tribal youth through skill-building and self-improvement techniques in a culturally inclusive and health-oriented environment.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Training and Development:** The scheme offers a seven-day residential training camp focused on personality development and yogasana. The training covers aspects of physical fitness, mental well-being, and spiritual awareness. > **Note:** A total of 50 tribal youths (both male and female) are selected from each of the 17 targeted districts.

children.text: The scheme "TASP Personality Development and Yogasana Training Camp (TASP)" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to empower Scheduled Tribe (ST) youth across 17 districts of the state by providing a structured seven-day training program. This camp focuses on personality development and yogasana training, helping the participants to develop their physical, mental, and spiritual health. The scheme seeks to uplift tribal youth through skill-building and self-improvement techniques in a culturally inclusive and health-oriented environment.
The scheme offers a seven-day residential training camp focused on personality development and yogasana. The training covers aspects of physical fitness, mental well-being, and spiritual awareness.
A total of 50 tribal youths (both male and female) are selected from each of the 17 targeted districts.
The interested applicant should download the prescribed format of the application form.
In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the office of the District Youth Development Officer.
Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The interested applicant should download the prescribed format of the application form. **Step 2:** In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required). **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the office of the District Youth Development Officer. **Step 4:** Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat. - The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category.
